mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RESERVATION ( reservation_id, from_account, to_account, amount, memo, scheduled_at, status, created_at ) VALUES ( 'RSV-' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || LPAD(SEQ_RESERVATION.NEXTVAL, 6, '0'), #{fromAccount}, #{toAccount}, #{amount}, #{memo}, TO_TIMESTAMP(#{scheduledAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS'), 'PENDING', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT reservation_id, from_account, to_account, amount, memo, scheduled_at, status, created_at FROM RESERVATION WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND scheduled_at <= SYSDATE ORDER BY scheduled_at ASC
